overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit downtown district. The player character moves along wet sidewalks past futuristic commercial buildings, under an elevated highway, and through areas with moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with futuristic storefront

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past pedestrians and illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera

entered.detail: commercial building with prominent red neon signage and blue accent lighting
large illuminated white sculpture of a female figure outside the building entrance
embedded ground-level neon light strips running along the walkway
futuristic vehicles moving along the wet asphalt road with light reflections

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a neon-lit commercial street at night, with the camera moving past a building featuring prominent red neon signage and a large white illuminated statue. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalk, and futuristic vehicles pass by on the wet street to the right, their lights reflecting off the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk approaching highway overpass with large billboard

events.description: passing the large vertical red ZEIG DICH poster on the left building wall

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the red poster toward the overpass structure ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket and shorts walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large vertical red billboard displaying ZEIG DICH text with a female figure
elevated highway structure with yellow and black striped support columns

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past a distinctive large red poster on the left wall and approaches an elevated highway overpass. The traffic on the right becomes more prominent as the camera nears the intersection, and pedestrians continue to pass by in both directions.

events.description: entering the darker covered area beneath the highway overpass
multiple futuristic vehicles passing by closely on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass alongside heavy traffic flow

entered.detail: massive concrete support pillars with yellow and black hazard striping

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a darker, covered area beneath the elevated highway. Massive concrete supports with yellow and black stripes line the left side, while dense traffic flows past on the right. The lighting becomes more artificial and shadowed compared to the open neon-lit street.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale commercial district with palm trees and digital displays

events.description: exiting the overpass into an open area with palm trees and large digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking past palm trees toward the illuminated Marquee sign and modern glass buildings

notable_agents.action: two children walking ahead on the sidewalk in colorful clothing

entered.detail: large illuminated signage displaying MARQUEE in bright neon letters
modern multi-story building with illuminated interior windows and glass facade
palm trees in planters lining the center of the wide sidewalk
massive digital billboard displaying BODY WITH LIGHTS advertisement

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass, the scene opens into a more upscale commercial area featuring palm trees along the sidewalk, a prominent MARQUEE neon sign, and modern glass buildings. Two children walk ahead of the camera, and large digital billboards illuminate the right side of the street while traffic continues to flow by.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit downtown district that transitions from a vibrant commercial street into a shadowed underpass before emerging into an upscale urban plaza. It begins by gliding past red neon signage and a large illuminated statue, with the camera tracking along a wet sidewalk where city lights reflect off the pavement. As the camera moves past a large red poster, the open street narrows toward an elevated highway overpass where the flow of futuristic traffic becomes more prominent. The scene then shifts into the artificial shadows beneath the overpass, passing massive concrete supports marked with yellow and black stripes. Finally, the camera exits the covered area and opens into a brighter, high-end district featuring palm trees, glass buildings, and towering digital billboards that illuminate the path ahead.
